title: Huawei 10G SFP+ AOC optical cable, active, DDM, 10m
description: The Huawei active optical cable SFP-10G-AOC10M of Multi Mode type is used for direct connection of two SFP+ ports with a line speed of 10 Gbps. With a length of 10m and a bend radius of 30mm , it is suitable for connecting a pair of active devices, for example, between neighboring cabinets GPSR
